rh-Polypeptide-69 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Collagen Alpha-1 (III) Chain used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 1466 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Victoria Amazonica Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Victoria amazonica, Nymphaeaceae .
Cetearamidoethyl Diethonium Hydrolyzed Keratin is the quaternary ammonium salt
Butyl 2-Glyceryl Ascorbate is the organic compound
Glyceryl Laurate Diacetate is the organic compound
Cetyl 2-Glyceryl Ascorbate is the organic compound

Chitosan Stearamide Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride is the quaternary ammonium salt formed by the reaction of Chitosan and stearic anhydride and quaternized by 3-chloro-2-hydroxypropyltrimethylammonium chloride.
Gardenia Jasminoides Leaf Cell Extract is the extract of the leaf cells obtained from Gardenia jasminoides grown in culture, Rubiaceae.
Anacardoyl sh-Pentapeptide-5 Tripeptide-1
Lauryl 2-Glyceryl Ascorbate is the organic compound

sh-Polypeptide-16 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Placental Growth Factor used such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 221 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Oleoyl Dipeptide-15 is the product obtained by the reaction of oleoyl chloride and Dipeptide-15
Sodium Methyl Laurate Sulfonate is the sodium salt of the sulfonated methyl ester of Lauric Acid.
Disporum Sessile Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Disporum sessile, Liliaceae.
Cocoyl Pentapeptide-12 is the product obtained by the reaction of coconut acid chloride and Pentapeptide-12
Cocoyl Tripeptide-36 is the product obtained by the reaction of coconut acid chloride and Tripeptide-36
Hydrolyzed Schizosaccharomyces Protein is the hydrolysate of the protein derived from Schizosaccharomyces derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
